heading: Today
text: Cloudy with a spotty rain or snow showers this morning, snow showers more likely from I-89 northeast this afternoon, especially over the higher terrain, a dusting to an inch. Highs in the 30s, from 30 to 40 north to south. Winds northeast 5 to 10 mph, becoming northwest 10 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Snow showers over the higher terrain north and east of I-89, a dusting to an inch, then partial clearing, last over the northeast mountains. Lows from the mid teens to mid 20s north to south. Winds northwest near 10 mph, diminishing to light.

heading: Tuesday
text: A few early clouds northeast, otherwise sunshine, mixing with increasing afternoon clouds. Highs 30s to low 40s. Winds light, becoming southwest 5 to 15 mph.
